home.heroDesc: All the tools you need for CrossFit & HYROX training — 1RM Calculator, WOD Timer, and Workout Library, provided for free.

tools.calculatorDetail: Automatically calculate your CrossFit/Powerlifting 1RM and percentage tables.
tools.timerDesc: AMRAP · EMOM · Tabata · For Time · HIIT
tools.timerDetail: 5 modes, sound alerts + screen stays on.
tools.wodDetail: Girl · Hero · Open WODs. Includes scaling options.
tools.mapDetail: Check drop-in prices and info for CrossFit boxes across the country at a glance.
tools.communityDetail: HYROX Schedule · Local Comps · Discussion Board

home.featuresDesc: CrossFit Box Drop-in Map & HYROX Competition Community
home.statsDesc: CrossFit & HYROX training contents provided by FITTERS STUDIO
home.aboutDesc: CrossFit is a training methodology that performs Functional Movements that are Constantly Varied at High Intensity. It improves real-life and sports performance by balancing the 10 elements of fitness, including cardiovascular endurance, strength, power, flexibility, and agility.

points.p1Desc: Practical exercises based on everyday movements.
points.p2Desc: Maximum efficiency training with short, intense WODs.
points.p3Desc: No boredom with a different WOD every day.

about.heroSubtitle: A complete guide for beginners to CrossFit & HYROX
about.hyroxOpenDesc: Beginner category. Some movement weights can be adjusted

calculator.title: 1RM Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Calculate your max weight and check the percentage table
calculator.ctaDesc: Record and manage your PRs, and share your progress.
calculator.bwPullup: Pull-up: body weight × 1.0 = your body weight is the load
calculator.bwPushup: Push-up: approximately 65% of body weight load
calculator.bwDip: Dips: body weight × 1.0 (+ additional weight possible)
calculator.bwHspu: HSPU: body weight × 1.0 (varies by forearm position)
calculator.equipBarbellDesc: Start serious training with an Olympic barbell 20kg + plate sets.
calculator.equipDumbbellDesc: Efficiently utilize various weights with adjustable dumbbell sets.
calculator.equipBodyweightDesc: Equip yourself with a pull-up bar + dip bar set for bodyweight training basics.

timer.title: WOD Timer
timer.subtitle: Select a mode and start the timer
timer.amrapDesc: Complete as many rounds as possible during the set time.
timer.emomDesc: Complete the set movement every minute and rest for the remaining time.
timer.tabataDesc: High-intensity interval training with 20 sec work / 10 sec rest repeated 8 times.
timer.fortimeDesc: Complete the given movement within the time limit. Stop the timer when done.
timer.intervalDesc: Perform repeated interval training with set work/rest times.

wod.title: WOD Library
wod.subtitle: {count} Benchmark WODs · Girl / Hero / Open
wod.noResultsDesc: Try different search terms or filters

wodHistory.noChallenges: You haven't logged this WOD yet

map.title: Drop-in Map
map.subtitle: Find CrossFit boxes nationwide and check drop-in info
map.g1Desc: Drop-in means visiting another CrossFit box (not your home box) for a single class visit. You can search by boxes nationwide and train at a nearby location.
map.g2Desc: Always contact the box in advance before visiting for a drop-in. Class size limits and rules may vary.
map.g3Desc: If box information displayed on the map (address, hours, etc.) is inaccurate, please send an update request via [Register a Box] below.
map.mapNote: ※ Map data is based on Kakao Map Places API. Always confirm actual operation and drop-in fees directly with each box.
map.noBoxDesc: Register your box info and it will be reviewed and added to the map
map.successNote: It will be reviewed and added to the map.
map.formValidContact: Please enter your name and email.

movements.title: CrossFit Movement Guide
movements.subtitle: Learn the technical standards, common mistakes, and scaling methods for 15 core movements. Complete guide for all levels from beginners to RX athletes.
movements.catUpperDesc: Upper pulling and pushing movements that train the back, shoulders, and chest. The core of functional strength.
movements.catLowerDesc: Lower body movements that develop explosive power and strength centered on quadriceps, glutes, and hamstrings.
movements.catMetabolicDesc: High-intensity conditioning movements that maximize heart rate and develop whole-body metabolic capacity.
movements.ctaTitle: Apply what you learned to WODs
movements.ctaDesc: Check 37 Girl, Hero, Open benchmark WODs and start today's challenge.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: HYROX Events · Major Competitions · Free Board
community.majorNote: Check the official schedule on Instagram
community.successCompDesc: Competition has been added to the list.
community.successCompNote: It will be officially posted after administrator review.

wodLog.title: WOD LOG
wodLog.subtitle: Save your workout records and track your progress
wodLog.fCustomPh: Enter WOD details (press Enter for new line)
wodLog.noRecordsDesc: Record your first WOD in the Add Record tab!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Desc: FITTERS STUDIO is a service available without separate membership registration. We currently do not collect personal information, but anonymous statistical data may be collected through Google Analytics and Google AdSense to improve the service.
privacy.s2Intro: The following information may be automatically collected during service use:
privacy.s2Li1: IP address (for service security and statistical purposes)
privacy.s2Li3: Pages visited and time spent (Google Analytics)
privacy.s3Desc: The WOD log feature stores data in the user's device local storage (localStorage). This data is not transmitted to a server and can be deleted by the user directly in the browser.
privacy.s4Desc1: Google AdSense and Google Analytics use cookies. Information collected through cookies is used for ad personalization and service analysis.
privacy.s4Desc2: You can refuse cookie collection through browser settings, but some service features may be limited.
privacy.s5Intro: This service uses the following third-party services:
privacy.s5Outro: The privacy policies of each service follow the policies of the respective service providers.
privacy.s6Desc: Collected anonymous statistical data is retained for up to 26 months for service analysis purposes. Local storage data is retained on the device until deleted by the user.
privacy.s7Intro: Users may exercise the following rights:
privacy.s7Li1: Withdrawal of consent for personal information collection and use
privacy.s7Li2: Request to stop processing personal information
privacy.s8Desc: For inquiries, complaints, and damage relief regarding personal information processing, please contact us below.
privacy.s9Desc: This Privacy Policy may be changed in accordance with relevant laws and company policies. Changes will be announced through in-service notices.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Desc: These Terms govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between the Company and users in relation to the use of the FITTERS STUDIO website (the "Service") operated by Fitters Studio (the "Company").
termsPage.s2Intro: FITTERS STUDIO provides the following tools and information for the CrossFit and HYROX community:
termsPage.s2Li1: 1RM Calculator (max weight calculation based on Epley formula)
termsPage.s2Li2: WOD Timer (AMRAP, EMOM, Tabata, For Time, Interval)
termsPage.s2Li3: WOD Library (Girl, Hero, CrossFit Open WOD information)
termsPage.s3Intro: Users must not engage in the following actions:
termsPage.s3Li1: Stealing others' information or entering false information
termsPage.s3Li2: Unauthorized copying, distribution, or commercial use of information obtained through the service
termsPage.s3Li3: Interfering with the Company's service operations
termsPage.s3Li4: Actions that violate applicable laws and regulations
termsPage.s4Desc1: The 1RM calculator, WOD information, and exercise guides provided by this service are for reference purposes only. Results may vary depending on individual physical conditions and health status, and we recommend consulting a professional before exercising.
termsPage.s4Desc2: The Company does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of the information provided, and is not responsible for any damages resulting from actions taken based on information obtained through the service.
termsPage.s5Desc: The Company may change or discontinue all or part of the service as operationally or technically necessary, and will not provide separate compensation to users for this.
termsPage.s6Desc: The service may contain Google AdSense advertisements and affiliate links. Transactions through advertisements and affiliate links are between the user and the respective company, and the Company is not responsible for these.
termsPage.s7Desc: These Terms shall be interpreted under the laws of the Republic of Korea, and disputes related to the use of the service shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Korean courts.
termsPage.s8Desc: For inquiries regarding the Terms of Service, please contact us at the email below.
